channel.title: Anime Architecture Archive — New Universes
channel.description: New anime universes added to the archive. Structured analysis of power systems, factions, causal logic, and worldbuilding mechanics.

item.title: Anime Architecture Archive — 15 Universes Now Live
item.description: Browse 15 structured anime universe analyses. Compare power systems, map faction dynamics, and explore causal logic across Attack on Titan, Jujutsu Kaisen, Solo Leveling, My Hero Academia, and more.

item.title: System vs Lore: How Anime Architecture Archive Maps Fictional Universes as Systems
item.description: Most anime wikis summarize plots. This archive maps universes as systems — analyzing power mechanics, governing rules, faction networks, and causal chains that determine how each world actually functions.
